title: Revenge Cove
description: Revenge Cove aims to be a focused and smooth running mod pack with fun and engaging mods that add to the Minecraft experience.
body:
![cover-image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BsXK07lW/images/c7eb0430d5eb44d7a90d89bb75d344c120293774.png)
**A Modpack over 10 years in the making** Revenge cove was initially conceptualized sometime around 2013 by a few friends that had been running modded servers in the community for a few years already. 

The intention of this modpack has always been to offer a focused and optimized pack to people that want to play but don't feel the need to have 12 solutions to every problem. 

<details>

<summary>More Lore</summary>

Since those days so much has changed, there's so many new mods and modpacks but I still ran into the same problems trying to find a pack to play on. It feels like you either get too many mods or too little. 

Que Revenge Cove, rather than try and find a pack that suited my wants I'm just going to put everything together from the ground up and tweak it until it plays smoothly. 

</details>

![featured-mods-banner](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1186130589498224784/1186133944941432853/featured_banner2b.png?ex=65922451&is=657faf51&hm=6e56a49e32dbf95d7011068f2fbe6f2b86c16f6d11e61e967957249d8ebb2a93&)   

![featured-mods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BsXK07lW/images/e44d0450ed26be51d75b8a79abd9fb0ffabdf2d6.png)
**This pack was built** to extend the fun of minecraft, and thoughtfully add mods that both enhance and expand gameplay, but also mods that optimize and make playing the pack a breeze. 

With **Create**, **Ad Astra**, **AE2**, **Mekanism**, and so many more, we've curated a list focuses in on the fun, adding more than enough, while still not being too overwhelming. 

**This pack** adds Tech, Automation, Space Exploration, Quality of Life improvements, and more. 

![featured-optimization-banner](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1186130589498224784/1186134851091443712/featured_banner1.png?ex=65922529&is=657fb029&hm=464ea464704e8051170483c70b51247cb59a5c27978a133165ef77b5caa0aa24&)
![featured-optimization](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1186130589498224784/1186130675162693722/Optimization.png?ex=65922146&is=657fac46&hm=17ad569753053e06888f6b0087477a2daa95672e66bf7180c1dc84779e5f2e77&)

Rather than just tossing every mod possible into the pack and praying nothing breaks, each mod is thoughtfully added to enhance gameplay while not being overwhelming or broken.

**Oculus & Rubidium built into the client**

**More to come**
As mods evolve, are born, and die this pack plans to grow with the community and remain a fun and stable option for gameplay
